zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster於1165年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆時，他的父親Hervey Walter35歲，母親Matilda De Valoignes30歲。他於1192年與Maud Le Vavasour結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1185年被列為created first hereditary butler of ireland。他去世於1206年2月4日在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福 卡素享年41歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿炳頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster于1165年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆时，他的父亲Hervey Walter35岁，母亲Matilda De Valoignes30岁。他于1192年与Maud Le Vavasour结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1185年被列为created first hereditary butler of ireland。他去世于1206年2月4日在爱尔兰庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福 卡素享年41岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿炳頓。

nameMeanings.name: Botler
meanings: Anglo-Norman: Botel or botelle, a bottle, and ere, indicating an agent, meaning a bottler

variants.name: Butler
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

nameMeanings.name: Le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster was born in 1165, in West Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hervey Walter, was 35 and his mother, Matilda De Valoignes, was 30. He married Maud Le Vavasour in 1192. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1185, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as created first hereditary butler of ireland. He died on 4 February 1206, in Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Ireland, at the age of 41, and was buried in Abington, County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster est né en 1165, à West Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hervey Walter, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Valoignes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Maud Le Vavasour en 1192. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1185, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est created first hereditary butler of ireland. Il est décédé le 4 février 1206, à Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlande, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Abington, County Limerick, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster 1165 in West Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hervey Walter 35 und seine Mutter Matilda De Valoignes 30. Er hat 1192 Maud Le Vavasour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1185, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als created first hereditary butler of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Februar 1206 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irland und wurde in Abington, County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster è nato il nel 1165 nel West Dereham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hervey Walter, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Matilda De Valoignes, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Maud Le Vavasour nel 1192. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1185, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come created first hereditary butler of ireland. Morì il 4 febbraio 1206, nel Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlanda, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Abington, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancasterが1165年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエスト デレハムで生まれた時，父Hervey Walterは35歳，母Matilda De Valoignesは30歳であった。1192年にMaud Le Vavasourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1185年，20歳の時，職業はcreated first hereditary butler of irelandと記録されている。彼は1206年2月4日にアイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウアルクロウ カストルで41歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックアビントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스트 더함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey Walter(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda De Valoignes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1192년 Maud Le Vavasour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1185년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 created first hereditary butler of ireland이었다. 그는 1206년 2월 4일 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 아클로 카스틀에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 압잉턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster nasceu em 1165, em West Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hervey Walter, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Matilda De Valoignes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Le Vavasour em 1192. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1185, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como created first hereditary butler of ireland. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1206, em Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlanda, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Abington, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster родился в 1165 г. в местности вест дирэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hervey Walter было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Valoignes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Le Vavasour в 1192 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1185 году, в возрасте 20 лет,  он работал по профессии created first hereditary butler of ireland. Он умер 4 февраля 1206 г. в местности арклоу кастл, коунти викклоу, Ирландия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности абингтон, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald Fitzwalter Le Botler 1st Baron Butler Of Ireland And England Sheriff Of Lancaster nació en 1165, en West Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hervey Walter, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Matilda De Valoignes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Maud Le Vavasour en 1192. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1185, a la edad de 20 años, su ocupación registrada era created first hereditary butler of ireland. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1206, en Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlanda, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Abington, County Limerick, Irlanda.
